welcome: Welcome. Let's get your claim started.
welcome_sub: This will take about 5 minutes. Your information is secure and confidential.
intake_method_header: How would you like to describe your injury?
text_prompt: In your own words, describe what happened, where it hurts, and when it occurred.
text_placeholder: Include: what you were doing, how you got hurt, and what part of your body was injured.
voice_prompt: Tap the microphone and describe what happened in your own words. Speak as long as you need.
voice_consent: By tapping "Start Recording", you consent to this recording being used to process your workers' compensation claim. This recording will be stored as part of your claim record.
voice_review_sub: Here is what we heard. You can edit any field below.
voice_warning: 30 seconds remaining. Recording will stop automatically.
voice_text_placeholder: Describe your injury in as much detail as possible: what you were doing, how it happened, what part of your body was hurt, and when it happened.
media_sub: Upload photos of your injury or the scene where it happened. This step is optional but helps document your claim.
media_drop: Drag photos or video here, or tap to choose
media_accepted: Accepted: JPEG, PNG, HEIC, MP4, MOV — Max 50MB per file, 5 files total
media_error_type: File type not allowed. Please upload JPEG, PNG, HEIC, MP4, or MOV.
media_error_size: File is too large. Maximum file size is 50MB.
mpn_rights_notice: You have the right to receive all medical treatment reasonably required to cure or relieve the effects of your work injury. Your employer is a member of a Medical Provider Network (MPN). You must choose a doctor from this network for your treatment. If you have a pre-designated personal physician, you may see that doctor instead — contact your adjuster for details. For emergencies, go to the nearest emergency room regardless of network status.
mpn_acknowledge: I understand my MPN rights and choose to select a provider below
mpn_instruction: Select a provider near you. Call the office to schedule your appointment.
mpn_no_results: No providers found near your zip code. Please call your adjuster at (800) XXX-XXXX.
book_instruction: Call the provider below to schedule your appointment. Then enter the confirmation number they give you.
confirmation_placeholder: Enter the number from your call
book_confirmed_sub: Your appointment has been booked. An authorization letter has been sent to the provider.
dwc1_instruction: Please review the information below. This is your DWC-1 workers' compensation claim form.
dwc1_review_note: All information was filled in from your statement and employment records. If anything is incorrect, contact your adjuster.
dwc1_signature_notice: Electronic signature is coming soon. Your adjuster, Akash Kumar, will contact you by phone to complete your signature.
dwc1_pending_note: Your claim has been received. We will contact you within 1 business day.
complete_sub: Your claim has been submitted. Here's what happens next:
complete_step1: Your adjuster will review your claim within 1 business day.
complete_step2: You'll receive a call or text to confirm your appointment and next steps.
complete_step3: Keep all medical receipts and records related to your injury.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us at (800) XXX-XXXX.
error_token: This link has expired or already been used. Please contact your employer for a new link.
error_network: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.
